name: Talked to insurance adjuster already about exposure, mistake?

mainEntity.name: Talked to insurance adjuster already about exposure, mistake?

acceptedAnswer.text: Get lawyer now; limit further talks.
acceptedAnswer.description:
**Possibly; statements can be used against you without lawyer.**

Adjusters minimize claims; record everything[2].

- Don't admit fault.
- Get lawyer before more talks.
- Written over verbal.

Attorney takes over communications. Protect yourself[2].

description: Get lawyer now; limit further talks.
